channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Adelaide Defeats Carlton in Rain-Soaked Gather Round Clash
item.description: In a thrilling opening to the AFL’s 2026 Gather Round, Adelaide overcame Carlton with a 28-point victory in challenging weather conditions. Carlton began strong with seven goals in the first quarter, ...

item.title: Jafo suggests short-term employment program to address graduate unemployment
item.description: Selemani Jafo, the Kisarawe Member of Parliament, has proposed the creation of a short-term employment program to combat the high unemployment rate among graduates in Tanzania. Speaking during a parli...

item.title: AI Used by Pro-Iran Groups to Influence Trump and Conflict Narratives
item.description: A recent report reveals that pro-Iran groups have been increasingly utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) to manipulate online discourse, specifically targeting former U.S. President Donald Trump and...

item.title: Caitlin Johnstone Warns of Dangerous U.S. Escalation Toward Iran and Growing Speech Restrictions on Palestine
item.description: In an April 6, 2026, opinion piece by Caitlin Johnstone, republished by Nuclear-News, the author condemns recent military threats by President Donald Trump against Iran, arguing that he has crossed in...

item.title: Insights from China–Africa Legal Cooperation under the Belt and Road Framework
item.description: This article, written by Novatus Igosha, narrates a Tanzanian legal scholar’s enriching experience during a professional seminar in Beijing and Wuhan, under China’s Academy for International Business ...

item.title: Global tensions and record voter participation in India: US-Iran ceasefire and Assam elections
item.description: The news today highlights several significant developments both internationally and within India. In West Asia, Israeli strikes in Lebanon killed 203 people and injured over a thousand, marking the la...

item.title: Hamilton Launches Program Allowing Doctors to Prescribe Nature Passes
item.description: Residents of Hamilton can now receive prescriptions for access to local conservation areas through the PaRx program, designed to connect people with nature for mental and physical well-being. Doctors ...

item.title: Widespread Sextortion Harassment Faced by Kenyan Women Accessing Public Services
item.description: A new survey by the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) in Kenya has revealed a deeply troubling issue: a staggering 73 per cent of women seeking public services report experiencing repeated ...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard strengthens presence with new district command in Kalayaan Islands
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) has established a new district command in the Kalayaan Island Group (KIG), significantly expanding its operations and territorial presence in the West Philippine Sea. ...

item.title: Pakistani student in Canada pleads guilty to planning terror attack in New York
item.description: Muhammad Shahzeb Khan, a 21-year-old Pakistani who entered Canada on a student visa in 2023, has pleaded guilty in Manhattan federal court to attempting acts of terrorism that crossed national borders...

item.title: Canadian woman allegedly tricked by online romance scam faces drug charges in South Korea
item.description: Spring Parks, a 59-year-old woman from Surrey, British Columbia, has been arrested in South Korea after customs officials discovered nearly four kilograms of methamphetamine in her luggage. Parks had ...

item.title: Ogun Government Takes Action to Improve Power Supply
item.description: The Ogun State Government has activated the Ogun State Electricity Regulatory Commission (OGSERC) to tackle the state’s unreliable power supply. The Head of Service, Kehinde Onasanya, emphasized the n...

item.title: Rubicon Fashion Brand Agrees to Repay Misused NSF Grant of R2.7m
item.description: In a recent development, Hangwani Nengovhela, the owner of Rubicon Communications, a prominent fashion brand, has agreed to repay R2.7 million after the company misused a grant awarded by the National...

item.title: George Clooney criticises Donald Trump over Iran threat, citing war crime concerns
item.description: George Clooney has publicly condemned former US President Donald Trump's remark that 'a whole civilisation will die tonight' if conflict arose with Iran, describing it as a war crime. Speaking to high...

item.title: Global Oil and Gas Supply Changes Likely Permanent Post-Iran War
item.description: The energy sector is unlikely to return to pre-war conditions, according to industry leaders and analysts. The ongoing conflict in the Middle East has forced changes to how oil and LNG supplies are so...

item.title: OpenAI anticipates $2.5-billion in advertising revenue for 2026 and outlines long-term growth targets
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly expecting to generate US$2.5-billion in advertising revenue this year, with projections indicating a rapid increase over the coming decade. According to Axios, citing sources fami...

item.title: International Drugs Network: Scottish Crime Boss Arrested in Spain
item.description: Spanish police have successfully dismantled a criminal drugs gang with links to the Lyons family, a prominent Scottish organised crime group. The operation, dubbed ‘Armorum,’ has resulted in the arres...

item.title: Green Party leader Zack Polanski calls for UK to cut all ties with Israel and end £6bn trade relationship over Lebanon strikes
item.description: Green Party leader Zack Polanski has demanded that the UK government immediately sever all diplomatic and trade ties with Israel, which he described as a 'rogue state' committing 'terror acts' in Leba...

item.title: Trump links Iran peace to nuclear disarmament and open Strait of Hormuz
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump don talk say peace between America and Iran go only happen if Iran ends any plan to build nuclear weapons and make sure say the Strait of Hormuz remain open for global trad...

item.title: Zenith Bank of Nigeria Completes Full Takeover of Kenya’s Paramount Bank After Regulatory Clearance
item.description: Nigeria’s Zenith Bank Plc has finalised the purchase of all shares in Paramount Bank Limited, a move that got the green light from the Central Bank of Kenya (CBK) and the National Treasury in March 20...
